ns0:entry.ns0:title: [go] opencode-ai/opencode
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/opencode-ai/opencode
Language: go
A powerful AI coding agent. Built for the terminal.

ns0:entry.ns0:title: [swift] FluidInference/FluidAudio
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/FluidInference/FluidAudio
Language: swift
Frontier CoreML audio models in your apps — text-to-speech, speech-to-text, voice activity detection, and speaker diarization. In Swift, powered by SOTA open source.

ns0:entry.ns0:title: [swift] apple/swift-asn1
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/apple/swift-asn1
Language: swift
An implementation of ASN.1 for Swift

ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/darrylmorley/whatcable
Language: swift
macOS menu bar app that tells you, in plain English, what each USB-C cable plugged into your Mac can actually do

ns0:entry.ns0:title: [rust] LargeModGames/spotatui
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/LargeModGames/spotatui
Language: rust
A fully standalone Spotify client for the terminal. Native streaming included, no daemon required.

ns0:entry.ns0:title: [rust] ModernRelay/omnigraph
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/ModernRelay/omnigraph
Language: rust
Lakehouse native graph engine with git-style workflows

ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/kdsz001/OpenWiki
Language: rust
OpenWiki — Mac desktop AI knowledge management tool. Capture clipboard, build personal wiki, get AI insights.

ns0:entry.ns0:title: [rust] macro-inc/macro
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/macro-inc/macro
Language: rust
Macro is a unified interface for email, messages, tasks, calls, agents, pull requests, docs, crm — linked together with shared AI memory.

ns0:entry.ns0:content:

ns0:entry.ns0:title: [javascript] GargantuaX/gemini-watermark-remover
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/GargantuaX/gemini-watermark-remover
Language: javascript
A high-performance, 100% client-side tool for removing Gemini AI image & video watermarks. Built with pure JavaScript using mathematically precise Reverse Alpha Blending. / 基于 JavaScript 的纯浏览器端 Gemini AI 图像和视频无损去水印工具，使用数学精确的反向 Alpha 混合算法

ns0:entry.ns0:title: [python] NVlabs/ProtoMotions
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/NVlabs/ProtoMotions
Language: python
ProtoMotions is a GPU-accelerated simulation and learning framework for training physically simulated digital humans and humanoid robots.

ns0:entry.ns0:title: [dart] Tarikul711/flutter-food-delivery-app-ui
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/Tarikul711/flutter-food-delivery-app-ui
Language: dart
The food ordering & delivery application designed based on the real-life scenario. Anyone can use this code on their own purpose. If you are interested please make your contribution to the code.

ns0:entry.ns0:title: [powershell] AutomatedLab/AutomatedLab
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/AutomatedLab/AutomatedLab
Language: powershell
AutomatedLab is a provisioning solution and framework that lets you deploy complex labs on HyperV and Azure with simple PowerShell scripts. It supports all Windows operating systems from 2008 R2 to 2022, some Linux distributions and various products like AD, Exchange, PKI, IIS, etc.

ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/patterniha/MITM-DomainFronting
Language: batchfile

ns0:entry.ns0:title: [html] matlab/simulink-agentic-toolkit
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/matlab/simulink-agentic-toolkit
Language: html
The Simulink Agentic Toolkit gives your AI agent both the tools and the expertise to work effectively with Simulink and Model-Based Design.
